ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Current owner of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "twitter" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the team */,
  "facebook" TEXT /* Facebook handle of the team */,
  "instagram" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "current_season" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the season is the current one */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Main sponsor of the league for the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Tournament format (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Referee of the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points per game */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede a goal */,
  "goal_difference_per_game" REAL /* Average goal difference per game */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total shots on target */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan engagement record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance at home matches */,
  "social_media_followers" INTEGER /* Number of social media followers */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Total ticket sales for the season */,
  "fan_club_members" INTEGER /* Number of fan club members */,
  "fan_club_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from fan club memberships */,
  "average_engagement_time" REAL /* Average time fans spend engaging with the team's content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the season */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the season */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit (revenue - expenses) */,
  "ticket_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from ticket sales */,
  "merchandise_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from merchandise sales */,
  "sponsorship_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from sponsorships */,
  "broadcast_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from broadcast rights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_and_wellness" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Details of any injuries */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Current fitness level */,
  "medical_treatment" TEXT /* Details of any medical treatment received */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "training_load" INTEGER /* Training load of the player */,
  "rest_days" INTEGER /* Number of rest days taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_and_wellness_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_and_wellness_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or analysis */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, admin, analyst) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed (e.g., match, team, player) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_text" TEXT /* Text of the rule */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rule became effective */,
  "repealed_date" TEXT /* Date the rule was repealed */,
  "rule_category" TEXT /* Category of the rule (e.g., match rules, financial rules, player rules) */,
  "rule_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)
